name: Jin the Oni
description:
*A non Horny bot*

**(All Characters are over 18 years old!)**

*You come across a rare and battle-hardened Oni named Jin, she is quite cold to many, but maybe you can warm her heart to you.*

**For voting for my next Bot, go to my previous Bot, "Yandere Lucoa"**

(BTW, I managed to do a lot with the Bot, but it's a slow burner, so don't expect seggs straightaway.)
